generated_oml:
instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi equipped with sensors for indoor air quality monitoring, though specific sensor types and measurement details are not detailed in the documents."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data collected from Raspberry Pi sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActiveMQ, LoggingApplication
]

instance PhysicalGreenhouseInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python application that interfaces with the Physical Greenhouse to transmit data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python application that logs greenhouse state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing greenhouse state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureDataPipelineEnabler
]

instance AzureDataPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for data pipeline implementation supporting runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeVisualizationService, SimulationService, PredictionService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical greenhouse state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of indoor air quality via runtime visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for scenario analysis using simulation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioAnalysisInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting virus spread prevention based on air quality data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadPreventionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of system integrity through fault detection and system evolution studies"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemIntegrityInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization for real-time monitoring of indoor air quality"
]

instance ScenarioAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation for scenario analysis"
]

instance VirusSpreadPreventionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction capabilities for virus spread prevention"
]

instance SystemIntegrityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of system integrity through fault detection and system evolution studies"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for documenting digital twin architecture context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArchitectureEnabler
]

instance ArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 Model architecture documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureService
]

instance ArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for architecture documentation using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureInsight
]

instance ArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Architecture documentation using C4 Model"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repositories for version control of digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for managing version control of digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control management for digital twin implementation"
]

instance GreenhouseDT : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual machine environment in GreenhouseDT for digital twin dissemination and behavioral adaptation between physical greenhouse and digital twin"
    base:contains RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor, LoggingApplication, AzureDataPipelineEnabler, InfluxDB, ActiveMQ, GitHubRepository
]

instance GreenhouseSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale greenhouse system with physical components including greenhouse structure and controller, designed for research and educational applications. Key characteristics include public availability, reproducibility through freely available software, and applicability in validating digital twin methodologies such as continuous validation, fault detection, and system evolution."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GreenhouseDT
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance ActiveMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker for data communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting data between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission between physical and virtual components"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for analysis and validation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) sends control commands through the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane for execution."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "An MQTT broker is utilized for signaling between services in the digital twin system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar integrates with Microsoft Azure services for digital twin pipeline implementation and utilizes AutomationML as an interoperability standard for model exchange. GreenhouseDT employs ActiveMQ for message brokering and InfluxDB for time-series data storage, though specific external system integrations beyond internal components are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML (Automation Markup Language) is used for structuring the digital twin in the Air Quality Management exemplar, adhering to industrial automation data exchange standards. The C4 Model is applied for standardized software architecture visualization. No additional industry certifications or interoperability standards beyond these are specified."
]
